title: RSW Porcelain Christmas Eve Plate - Santa and Rudolph Design - 10.5” - Personalise with Marker Included - Perfect for Kids Christmas Dinner - Festive Seasonal Xmas Plates
features: Festive Design: Features a delightful Santa and Rudolph design that adds a cheerful touch to Christmas dinner and excites little ones about mealtime.
Personalisation: Comes with a marker so you can personalise the plate with your child's name or a special message, making it a unique keepsake.
Encourages Independence: The plate is designed to motivate children to eat on their own, making mealtime more engaging and fun for kids.
Quality Porcelain: Crafted from durable porcelain, this plate is built to last and withstand the excitement of holiday celebrations year after year.
Perfect Size: With an approximate diameter of 10.5 inches, it's just the right size for serving Christmas treats, snacks, or festive meals.
description: "Make Christmas Eve extra special with our Porcelain Christmas Eve Plate featuring an adorable Santa and Rudolph design! Measuring 10.5 inches in diameter, this charming plate is perfect for kids’ Christmas dinners and can be personalised using the included marker. Made from high-quality porcelain, it not only adds a festive touch to your table but also encourages little ones to eat independently. This delightful plate is a wonderful addition to any Christmas collection and makes mealtime magical for children. Explore more festive tableware in the RSW Christmas collection! "
